titleStmt.title: SII 16.159: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 159. (A.R. No. 58 of 1915.) CHINNA-AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the goddess in the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.
This is dated, Śaka 1[46]9, Plavaṅga, Āśvija ba. 7, corresponding to 1547 A.D., October 5, (Wednesday).

It records an endowment of 120 varāhas into the temple treasury by Uggarasayya, son of Rāmarasayya and grandson of Uggarasayya of Guḍiyachellūru and belonging to the Kāśyapa-gōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākha, stipulating that the interest accruing from the amount was to be spent for offerings to god Vīra-Narasiṁha of Ahōbalam during the kshīrābdhi and other festivals.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . yētatsurāsurādhīśa mauḷiśrēṇi virājitaṁ . jayatu śrī nṛsiṁhva
sya dēvadēvasya śāsanaṁ . dēvaśrēṇi śirōratnaṁ daityadvipa ghaṭāṁkuśaṁ . jayatu śrī nṛsiṁha
sya dēvadēvasya śāsanaṁ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1469 Agunēṭi
plavaṁgga saṁvatsara Āśvīja ba 7 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vī
ra sadāsivadēva mahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍuṁḍayi
pṛthvīsāṁmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu svastiśrī caturdaśabhuvanādhīśvara śrī Ahō
bala vīranārasiṁhmadēvuni digvatirupatini perumāḷlu kārttika sōmavāraṁ nāṭikṣīrābdhi mahōtsavānakuṁnnu peru
māḷla vutsava divasālanu pallakiśāvappuḍu Aṣṭadikpālakulanu Āragiṁppulaku polivūṭu viḍici naḍa
vaṁ gaṭṭaḍa śēśinadi kāsyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina guḍiyacellūri vugarsayyaṁgā
ri pautruṁḍu rāmarsayyaṁgāri putruṁḍu Uggarsayyaṁgāru śrī Ahōbalēśvarula bhaṁḍā rānaku krayaṁ vara 50 yyinni A
ṁdula vaḍḍiki śelavugānu Āragiṁpuṁ jēśina kaṭṭaḍakramaṁ kṣīrābdhimahōtsavānaku
puṇyāhānaku biyya
ṁ ma 1 bellaṁ saṁ . pōṁkalu 4 Ākklu 8 tirukkaṇāmaduku biyyaṁ ma 1 milāśu 2 [Āḍa] 12
nārupesalu 1 pōṁkalu 40 Ākulu 80 gaṁdhaṁ tiruvaḷekkilaku nūne 103 ti ku biyyaṁ . neyi
Digital edition of SII 16.159 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
